payload.answer: SELECT is allowed; DELETE is denied in admin SQL select-only mode.
citations: Input: Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity lookup or merge is required for this routing decision.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode allows SELECT queries such as SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 and denies DELETE FROM memory_cards.

repair_options: If write access is needed, switch out of select-only mode.
Use SELECT-only queries against memory_cards while in this mode.
